qa.question: What is the difference between the appraised value and the purchase price?
qa.question_rephrased: By how much does the appraised value diverge from the purchase price?
qa.rephrase_note: Same intent (difference/divergence between appraised value and purchase price); signed currency answer still valid; genuinely reworded.

qa.rephrase_note: Same intent (average total-deposits per checking statement); answer unchanged; reworded.

qa.rephrase_note: Net movement = change start-to-end on daily-balance chart; answer unchanged; reworded.
